heading: Deputy Commandants
label: 8045 Deputy Commandants
text: There are in the Headquarters, Marine Corps, not more than eight Deputy Commandants, detailed by the Secretary of the Navy from officers on the active-duty list of the Marine Corps.
notes: Amendments2024— substituted “not more than eight Deputy Commandants” for “not more than seven Deputy Commandants”.Pub. L. 118–1592018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5045 of this title2016— substituted “seven” for “six”.Pub. L. 114–3282002— substituted “six” for “five”.Pub. L. 107–3142000— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are in the Headquarters, Marine Corps, a Chief of Staff, not more than five Deputy Chiefs of Staff, and not more than three Assistant Chiefs of Staff, detailed by the Secretary of the Navy from officers on the active-duty list of the Marine Corps.”Pub. L. 106–398

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
